basis: semianalysis.com Models & Research categories (Accelerator & HBM, AI Cloud TCO, AI Networking, ChipBook, Core Research, Datacenter Industry, Energy, Foundry Industry, Industrials, Memory, Space DC TCO, Tokenomics, VR NVL72 BoM & Power, Wafer Fab Equipment) + tools (ClusterMAX, InferenceX, GPU Pricing, Fab Map, Die Yield Calculator, Taiwan dashboard) + newsletter archive sweep (Jul 2026)

topics.name: AI Datacenters
topics.covers: buildouts, capacity claims, colo, construction, Datacenter Industry Model

topics.name: Power & Energy
topics.covers: grid constraints, behind-the-meter, gas/nuclear, cooling and thermal, Energy Model

topics.name: Accelerators & GPUs
topics.covers: Nvidia / AMD / custom ASIC, rack systems, NVL72 BoM and power, Accelerator Model, ChipBook

topics.name: Memory & HBM
topics.covers: HBM4, DRAM and CXMT, NAND, LTAs, Memory Model

topics.name: Foundry & Process
topics.covers: TSMC / Intel / Samsung / SMIC, nodes, yield, wafer economics, Foundry Industry Model, Fab Map

topics.name: Advanced Packaging
topics.covers: CoWoS, EMIB, interposers, custom HBM base dies, packaging capacity

topics.name: Fab Equipment & Litho
topics.covers: WFE, ASML and lithography, metrology, Die Yield Calculator

topics.name: AI Networking
topics.covers: scale-up and scale-out fabrics, NVLink, co-packaged optics, AI Networking Model

topics.name: GPU Clouds & Neoclouds
topics.covers: ClusterMAX ratings, GPU Pricing Index, AI Cloud TCO, neocloud economics

topics.name: AI Models & Labs
topics.covers: OpenAI / Anthropic / Meta compute, training and inference, tokenomics, InferenceX, RL systems

topics.name: Markets, Capex & Supply Chain
topics.covers: hyperscaler capex, earnings, financing and IPOs, Industrials Model, supply chain, Taiwan dashboard

topics.name: China & Export Controls
topics.covers: Huawei and SMIC ramps, export controls, HBM loopholes, geopolitical risk

topics.name: Space Datacenters
topics.covers: Space DC TCO, orbital compute (emerging coverage)

topics.name: Brand / Any
topics.covers: announcements, sign-offs, posts with no dominant topic — universal pool and fallback

assignment_rule.pick: pickBackdrop(topicKey, slideIndex, postSeed): pool = primary(topic) then secondary(topic) then primary(brand); index = (postSeed + slideIndex) % pool.length; if the chosen key equals the previous slide's key, advance one more. Slide 0 (cover) always draws from primary.
assignment_rule.assure: Because the pool starts with the topic's primary set, a topic-tagged post always gets an applicable background, with secondary + brand providing range across a multi-slide post. Deterministic given (topic, postSeed), so re-renders are stable.
assignment_rule.coverage: All 36 backdrops appear in at least one pool; no orphans.
